businessQuestion: Which products have the largest difference between forecasted demand and actual demand?
sqlAnswer:
SELECT
    DP.PRODUCT_NAME,
    DP.CATEGORY,
    DD.FISCAL_YEAR,
    SUM(FF.FORECASTED_UNITS) AS FORECASTED_UNITS,
    SUM(FF.ACTUAL_DEMAND_UNITS) AS ACTUAL_UNITS,
    SUM(FF.FORECASTED_UNITS) - SUM(FF.ACTUAL_DEMAND_UNITS) AS DEMAND_VARIANCE
FROM CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.FACT_FORECAST FF
JOIN CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.DIM_PRODUCT DP
    ON FF.PRODUCT_KEY = DP.PRODUCT_KEY
JOIN CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.DIM_DATE DD
    ON FF.DATE_KEY = DD.DATE_KEY
GROUP BY
    DP.PRODUCT_NAME,
    DP.CATEGORY,
    DD.FISCAL_YEAR
ORDER BY ABS(DEMAND_VARIANCE) DESC;
businessContext: Demand planning teams want to identify products with significant forecast deviations to improve inventory accuracy.
